leadText: PokéPark has several referrals: For the original theme park which operated in Japan and Taiwan, see PokéPark (theme park). For the theme park in Japan that opened in 2026, see PokéPark Kanto. For the DS Download Play-exclusive game available at the original PokéPark, see PokéPark Fishing Contest DS. For the first game in the PokéPark series, see PokéPark Wii: Pikachu's Adventure. For the second game in the PokéPark series, see PokéPark 2: Wonders Beyond. For the main location in the PokéPark series of games, see PokéPark (game). For a related search, see Pokémon Park.
